tasks.instruction: Purchase a Pop album in MP3 format priced under $12 with the highest customer rating and proceed to checkout.

tasks.instruction: Create a playlist named "Morning Run" with exactly 8 tracks under 4 minutes, including 4 Energetic songs and 4 Chill songs from at least 6 different artists.

tasks.instruction: Buy one Rock, one Jazz, and one Classical song, each priced under $2 with at least a 4-star rating and all by different artists, then view your cart.

tasks.instruction: Subscribe to the cheapest family plan costing under $20 per month that supports at least 5 accounts and includes offline downloads, and complete the subscription checkout.

tasks.instruction: Pre-order the two cheapest Vinyl albums releasing in 2026 or later that cost under $30 and are by different artists, then view your cart.

tasks.instruction: Using the Discover sections, add 5 songs released in the last 30 days with at least 4-star ratings to your wishlist, choosing 3 from New Releases and 2 from Top Charts.

tasks.instruction: Update your account settings to set Rock, Jazz, and Electronic as favorite genres, choose English as the preferred language, enable explicit content filtering, turn on notifications for new releases and promotions, and turn off product news notifications.
